ar_disputes.notes: Defective components received, affecting 40% of shipment. Vendor disputes claim.
ar_disputes.impact: Payment pending resolution, straining vendor relationship

ar_disputes.notes: Invoice shows different unit price than purchase order. 200 units affected.
ar_disputes.impact: Payment withheld, potential credit memo required

ar_disputes.notes: 2 out of 5 workstations not delivered as scheduled. Credit memo issued for $2,500.
24-hour service outage in November resulted in business loss. Full refund demanded.
ar_disputes.impact: Critical - vendor payment suspended, legal review recommended

ar_disputes.notes: Shipment arrived 10 days late, causing production delays and expediting costs.
ar_disputes.impact: Deduction requested for expediting costs incurred

ar_disputes.notes: Previous month's usage higher than billed. Credit applied from this month's invoice.
ar_disputes.impact: Resolved - adjustment applied to current invoice

payment_issues.description: Vendor has 3+ invoices overdue 60+ days. Payment terms consistently not met.
payment_issues.required_action: Enforce payment schedule, consider payment plan

payment_issues.description: Multiple overdue invoices 100+ days past due. Vendor credit suspended.
payment_issues.required_action: Urgent - Payment plan required before credit restoration

payment_issues.description: Increasing pattern of late payments over past 6 months. Currently 38 days overdue.
payment_issues.required_action: Monitor closely, escalate if pattern continues
